item.title: Can you call it a lick if the lick is 4 bars?🫢🌵 TAB and ba...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Can you call it a lick if the lick is 4 bars?🫢🌵 TAB and backing track for this ”lick” and much more is on my ➡️ Patreon🚂 $5/month to get access to all of my lessons, solos, etudes, licks, backing tracks and much more!
